specializations: Escalol® S - photostabilizer system for organic UV filters
product_highlights: SolaStay® S1 - proven avobenzone stabilization in elegant emollients
Essential for any avobenzone-based formulation requiring photostability
Unique combination of photostabilization and skin feel enhancement
Extensive photostability data and formulation support
notes: US-based world leader in UV filter photostabilization. Hallstar's Escalol® HP 610 and SolaStay® S1 are essential ingredients for any formulation containing avobenzone (PARSOL® 1789) — without photostabilization, avobenzone degrades rapidly under UV exposure. Hallstar bridges the gap between UV filter chemistry and elegant skin feel, combining photostabilization with emollient functionality.
